insight: In Boss <= 6.0.6, manually editing files in bosses/*.yml and running /boss reload silently reverts the edits: BossPlugin.onPluginPreReload() serializes every in-memory Boss back to disk before any file is re-read, and onPluginReload() never re-reads boss files. Workaround until patched: stop the server, edit the YAML, start it back up. Fix: drop the pre-reload save loop and call Boss.loadBosses() in onPluginReload() (menu setters already persist immediately, so removing the pre-save is safe).
